task_completion.description: Agent reads the incident ticket to extract the Case ID, Camera Name, and timestamps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing 'cat ~/incident_ticket.json' or a text editor displaying the JSON file contents, revealing Case ID 4492.

task_completion.description: Agent accesses the Nx Witness system via Web Admin or API.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser showing the Nx Witness Web Admin interface or API documentation at https://localhost:7001, or terminal showing API requests (e.g., curl or python scripts) to the Nx Witness endpoints.

task_completion.description: Agent exports the video footage as an MKV file to the evidence directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a successful download command (curl, wget, python script) saving to '~/evidence/case_4492.mkv', or browser showing the file being downloaded to that path.

task_completion.description: Agent generates a SHA-256 checksum for the exported MKV file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the execution of 'sha256sum ~/evidence/case_4492.mkv' or a similar hashing command.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the generated checksum to the correct file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing output redirection (e.g., '> ~/evidence/case_4492.mkv.sha256') or an 'ls ~/evidence' command confirming the '.sha256' file exists.

integrity.description: The MKV file was genuinely exported from the Nx Witness server.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of a real download from localhost:7001 (e.g., curl progress bar, browser download history) rather than the agent using 'touch' or 'echo' to create a fake MKV file.

integrity.description: The checksum was computed from the actual MKV file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent runs a real hashing tool (like sha256sum) on the MKV file, rather than writing a random or hardcoded hash string directly into the file.

integrity.description: The agent used the correct case ID from the ticket.
integrity.visual_evidence: The filenames 'case_4492.mkv' and 'case_4492.mkv.sha256' are used, matching the Case ID found in the incident ticket.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The incident ticket is located at '/home/ga/incident_ticket.json' and contains Case ID '4492' and Camera Name 'Parking Lot Camera'. The Nx Witness system is accessible at 'https://localhost:7001' (API endpoint '/rest/v1'). The exported video must be saved as '/home/ga/evidence/case_4492.mkv' and its SHA-256 checksum as '/home/ga/evidence/case_4492.mkv.sha256'.
